gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/404)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/404)
text: الْعَوْرَةُ عَوْرَتَانِ الْقُبُلُ وَ الدُّبُرُ فَأَمَّا الدُّبُرُ مَسْتُورٌ بِالْأَلْيَتَيْنِ فَإِذَا سَتَرْتَ الْقَضِيبَ وَ الْبَيْضَتَيْنِ فَقَدْ سَتَرْتَ الْعَوْرَةَ
وَ قَالَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى وَ أَمَّا الدُّبُرُ فَقَدْ سَتَرَتْهُ الْأَلْيَتَانِ وَ أَمَّا الْقُبُلُ فَاسْتُرْهُ بِيَدِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abu Yahya Al Wasity, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Maazy<sup>asws</sup> (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘The private parts are of two types, the front and the back. So as for the back, it is veiled by the two buttocks. So when the manhood and the two organs (under it) are veiled, so the private parts have been veiled’.
And he<sup>asws</sup> said in another report: ‘And as for the back, so the two buttocks have veiled it, and as for the front, so veil it with your hands’.
en.sarwar: 25. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Afi ibn Asbat who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, ‘Do not wash your head with the clay of Misr (Egypt); it destroys self-esteem and may cause one to become a pimp.’”
